story: As a child I lived for my dark green costume cupboard, pulling on granny scarves or a sailor’s cap to become someone else. We moved countries when I was eleven, and the cupboard stayed behind. Years later I moved back. Last spring, while clearing the flat, my parents boxed most of the costumes and set them by the garage door for donation. One afternoon they smiled and asked, “Do you want to look through your cupboard?”
implausible_knowledge: Last spring, while clearing the flat, my parents boxed most of the costumes and set them by the garage door for donation.
question: When her parents invite her to look through the old cupboard, what will she do next?
answer_with_knowledge: Ask to check the garage and retrieve the boxed costumes before opening the cupboard.
answer_without_knowledge: Hurry to the cupboard and open it, eager to try on a costume.
